title.en: The place where he retreated was directly shatt...

content.en:
Yahe Palace.

Feng Tuan was cultivating, and he didn't expect a disaster to come to him at all.

Rumble!!!!

The place where he retreated was directly shattered.

Immediately after, a big hand grabbed him out of the layers of formations.

"Lord of Huangze!"

Feng Tuan was dumbfounded, he didn't understand why the deputy palace master of the Lord of Huangze arrested him!

He didn't offend the Lord of Huangze either, speaking of which, he is still an ancient-level genius in the line of the Lord of Huangze!

Immediately afterward, he understood the existence of a bone transformation realm, and his eyes revealed killing intent.

"Feng Tuan, you are really bold!"

The Lord of Huangze roared angrily.

"Elders, deputy palace masters, what's going on?"

Feng Tuan asked.

"What's the matter?" "The Lord of Emperor Ze said coldly: "You went to the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift, let our position be exposed, and let the Bone Transformation Realm of the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift arrange a magic circle there, but when we got there, we entered their magic circle, and they shot directly." This time, we have fallen a total of six bone transformation realms, and even we have been severely damaged!"

Fallen Six Bone Transformation Realm!

Feng Tuan was shocked by the news, but this matter had nothing to do with him!

"Lord of Huangze, I really didn't go to the Territorial Sea Boundary Crack!" Feng Tuan explained: "I have been cultivating in Yahe Palace, and my servants can prove it!"

"Isn't it very easy to hide from your servants with your cultivation? Besides, when you go to the boundary of the territorial waters, you have seen a lot of blood transformation realms! You still want to quibble?" the Lord of Huangze was furious, "Whether you have reported the news or not, or have inadvertently revealed your whereabouts. In short, you are responsible for the loss of Yahe Palace. "

Rumble!!!

The Lord of Huangze directly pinched and exploded the phoenix cluster.

It stands to reason that an ancient-level genius like Feng Tuan is extremely valued by Yahe Palace, and even if he makes a big mistake, he will not kill him.

However, this time, the losses of Yahe Palace were too heavy, six bone transformation realms fell, and many bone transformation realms were seriously injured, this is a very serious situation!

Therefore, Feng Tuan must die, otherwise there is no way to explain.

......

"Feng Tuan is afraid that he never thought that he would die like this!"

Ye Tian smiled secretly.

Who let Feng Tuan trouble himself, he is usually very low-key, and he has been troubled and targeted by the other party several times.

Feng Tuan troubled him for only one reason, and that was resources.

Yahe Palace has so many resources to cultivate primordial-level geniuses, one more primordial-level genius, one more competitor.

Other primordial-level geniuses had backgrounds, and Feng Tuan didn't dare to target them, but Ye Tian, the Gu Lou Heavenly Ancestor, had no background in copying his body, so he was targeted.

Therefore, Ye Tian let Feng Tuan take the blame by the way.

After this incident, Yahe Palace will definitely not dare to invade the territorial sea boundary crack again, unless the palace master of Yahe Palace is allowed to get out of the customs and invade the territorial sea boundary crack again, but in case there are still traps?

At this time, the boundary gap in the territorial sea has been fully vigilant, and continued invasion will only cause more losses.

After all, Yahe Palace is weaker than the Hunhe Realm, even if it doesn't dare to take risks.

......

"Lord of Darkness, thanks to you this time!"

One of the bone-changing realms thanked.

If it weren't for the Dark Lord's insistence on this plan, they wouldn't have agreed to it.

"It's mainly our Endless Lord of the Dark Sea who provides the information!"

The Lord of Darkness said with a smile.

"That's right, that Endless Heavenly Ancestor is very good, if it weren't for him, if he really let those Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Yahe Palace descend, he could easily destroy any top overlord-level force, and countless Heavenly Ancestors would be killed. The Lord of the Void said approvingly.

Many bone transformation realms chatted for the sky and did not leave, they were also afraid that after the bone transformation realm of Yahe Palace was healed, they would invade again.

Therefore, they are ready to stay here for a few more years.

......

The years passed.

Ye Tian cultivated as usual, and as his strength increased, the more Gu Lou Tianzu's copy body was valued in Yahe Palace, and many of the primeval golden texts were opened to him, allowing him to comprehend a large number of primeval golden inscriptions.

In the blink of an eye, an ancient era passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already used resources such as the Mixed Ruins Liquid to refine his heart to the extreme of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and he had also cultivated a lot of primeval techniques, and his physical body was as strong as the Bone Transformation Realm.

Moreover, after the creation of an primeval era, he is also about to create the second supreme primeval bone technique.

this day.

Airplanes!

The second supreme archaeotic bone technique was created successfully.

Immediately, he fused this supreme primeval bone technique into an immeasurable bone.

Rumble!!!

This immeasurable bone completely changed into a bone, making his physical body stronger again.

At this point, he was left with only two immeasurable bones without bone transformation.

Cave of the Ruins.

Ye Tian's replica body was also cultivated by him to the extreme of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, which was also cultivated with a Mixed Ruins Cave, otherwise it would not have improved so quickly.

Moreover, he used his status to constantly scrape a little bit of resources in the Chaos Cave that were conducive to making countless bones and bones change, and every time he deducted a little, even if those bone transformation realms knew, he would not say anything.

The Blood Fish Talent, the Water Inheritance Talent, and the Dragon Flame Talent, the three replicating bodies all adopt this method, constantly scraping the resources that help the real body to replicate the immeasurable bone and bone transformation of the body.

In short, do nothing.

Occasionally, he would do other small things and steal resources.

Finally, on this day, a lot of resources were gathered.

Subsequently, his true body replica body brought these resources out of the Hunhe Realm.

"Hopefully, these resources will make one of my immeasurable bones re-skeletal again. "

Ye Tian said hopefully.

Subsequently, he began to refine these resources for bone transformation.

After a period of time, these resources were exhausted, and the bone transformation was not completed, but he created a top-notch primeval bone technique, integrated it into the immeasurable bone, and finally made this immeasurable bone complete the bone transformation.

"Only the last immeasurable bone is left!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

If this immeasurable bone also completes the bone transformation, then he will have completely reached the bone transformation realm, and his strength will be terrifyingly improved at that time, which is directly comparable to the ordinary three bone transformation realm heavenly ancestors.

No, it's much more powerful than the ordinary Triple Bone Transformation Realm.

After all, his strength was much stronger than that of an ordinary primeval-level genius!

"The speed of the Hunhe boundary crack has been getting faster and faster recently, and it is estimated that there will be another primeval era that can be completely integrated into the territorial sea boundary seam. At that time, hegemon-level forces such as Chaoxu Cave and Xishan will definitely invade the territorial sea boundary crack and occupy the territory. "

Before that time, he was going to completely step into the Bone Transformation Realm, and by the way, his three vests were also promoted to the Bone Transformation Realm and become the high-level of the Hunhe Boundary Seam, so there would be no problem at all.
